title: Lead The Villagers
description: Allows villagers to be moved with leads.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/1WhuY6q.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/VniXNq0.png)

You ever notice how much of a hassle it is just to get villagers from Point A to Point B? Having to use boats, water, and the like?

Well, this mod enables players to use leads on villagers like any other mob! Leash 'em, hook them up to fences, ignore all moral objections, and never have to deal with jumpy villager pathfinding again!
